command:
for wf in "Build AionUI" "Build Harbor-LLM" "Build KAG" "Build WGCloud" "Build Yuxi" "Build CC Gateway"; do
  id=$(gh workflow list --json name,id --jq ".[] | select(.name == \"$wf\") | .id")
  status=$(gh run list --workflow="$id" --limit 1 --json status,conclusion --jq '"\(.[0].status // "none") \(.[0].conclusion // "none")"')
  echo "$wf ($id): $status"
done

command: gh api -X POST repos/Heretek-AI/arcane-repo/actions/workflows/269476299/dispatches -f ref=main 2>&1 && echo "AionUI dispatched" && sleep 5

command:
for wf in "Build Harbor-LLM" "Build KAG" "Build CC Gateway"; do
  id=$(gh workflow list --json name,id --jq ".[] | select(.name == \"$wf\") | .id")
